verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I've seen a vision harsh and sweet One who gave all He had for me I've seen the passion of His death And the forgiveness in His final breath Now I can never be the same My heart has been forever changed I've got to live and love and give because He gave

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Now I'm giving my life away Laying it down on the altar Now I'm giving my life away The very least I can offer is my all So here I stand today Giving my life away

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: No earthly price could be too great No sacrifice too much to make No way to measuring the cost Next to the blood of Calvary's cross So if I live, I live for Him Or if I die, I count it gain My life is not my own, but His from this day on
